title: sfb_meg_phantom (B04/C01)
description: This dataset contains magnetoencephalography (MEG) recordings from a Neuromag phantom used to characterize device-specific artifacts generated by deep brain stimulation (DBS) systems. The study systematically evaluates DBS-induced electromagnetic interference in MEG recordings, providing essential reference data for understanding and mitigating DBS artifacts in clinical neurophysiological applications.
methods_description: MEG recordings were acquired using a Neuromag phantom system to characterize device-specific artifacts generated by deep brain stimulation (DBS) systems. The phantom was systematically exposed to DBS-induced electromagnetic interference to evaluate artifact generation and propagation in MEG recordings. Movement onset was recorded with an accelerometer and captured in MISC006-MISC008 channels. Raw data were collected without preprocessing to preserve artifact signatures for analysis and characterization.
